title.en: The one club man who is Spain's under-the-radar hero
title.zh-CN: 独一无二的俱乐部人物，西班牙不为人知的英雄

summary.en: Mikel Oyarzabal is perhaps not the biggest name in Spain's World Cup squad, but the one who has so far shone brightest.
summary.zh-CN: 米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）也许不是西班牙世界杯阵容中最大的名字，但到目前为止，他是最聪明的人。

title.en: Secret location & sleep devices: England bid to combat noisy Mexico fans
title.zh-CN: 秘密地点和睡眠设备：英格兰竞标打击嘈杂的墨西哥球迷

summary.en: England are taking precautions to ensure boisterous locals do not disrupt their preparations in Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰正在采取预防措施，以确保喧闹的当地人不会干扰他们在墨西哥的准备工作。

title.en: England-Mexico one of four last-16 ties live on BBC TV
title.zh-CN: 英格兰-墨西哥是英国广播公司电视台直播的最后16场比赛之一

summary.en: England's meeting with Mexico is one of four World Cup last-16 matches to be broadcast live on BBC One, BBC iPlayer and across BBC Sport.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队与墨西哥队的比赛是在BBC One、BBC iPlayer和BBC Sport直播的四场世界杯最后16场比赛之一。

title.en: England were 15 minutes from humiliation - the issues Tuchel must solve
title.zh-CN: 英格兰距离屈辱还有15分钟--图切尔必须解决的问题

summary.en: Before England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico, BBC Sport's Phil McNulty looks at the issues that remain for Thomas Tuchel.
summary.zh-CN: 在英格兰世界杯16强对阵墨西哥之前，英国广播公司体育台的菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）研究了托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）

title.en: 'Premier League goalkeepers will be throwing food at TV'
title.zh-CN: “英超守门员将向电视投掷食物”

summary.en: Joe Hart analyses the decision to rule out Marc Cucurella's goal against Austria for a foul on Austrian goalkeeper Alexander Schlager during their last-32 game in Los Angeles, with Hart believing the...
summary.zh-CN: 乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）分析了排除马克·库库雷拉（ Marc Cucurella ）在洛杉矶的最后一场32场比赛中对奥地利守门员亚历山大·施拉格（ Alexander Schlager ）犯规而对奥地利进球的决定，哈特（ Hart ）认为......

title.en: 'Spain are furious' - Cucurella has goal ruled out
title.zh-CN: “西班牙很愤怒” -库库雷拉的目标被排除在外

summary.en: Marc Cucurella sees his goal ruled out for a foul on Austrian goalkeeper Alexander Schlager during their round of 32 game in Los Angeles.
summary.zh-CN: 马克·库库雷拉（ Marc Cucurella ）在洛杉矶的32轮比赛中看到他的进球被奥地利门将亚历山大·施拉格（ Alexander Schlager ）犯规排除在外。

title.en: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
title.zh-CN: 英格兰墨西哥比赛允许酒吧营业至凌晨5点

summary.en: The government had initially said it would not relax licensing laws further for the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 政府最初表示不会进一步放宽世界杯的许可法。

title.en: Maddy Cusack's coach her 'nemesis', mum tells inquest
title.zh-CN: Maddy Cusack的教练她的“克星” ，妈妈告诉调查

summary.en: Cusack would still be alive if the coach of the women's team had not been employed, her mother says.
summary.zh-CN: 她的母亲说，如果女队的教练没有被雇用，库萨克还活着。

title.en: Tuchel wants young England fans to stay up for 1am World Cup clash - but should they?
title.zh-CN: 图切尔希望年轻的英格兰球迷熬夜观看凌晨1点的世界杯比赛，但他们应该吗？

summary.en: England's must-win match against Mexico kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday - disco naps and spoiler-free recaps may be needed.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰对墨西哥的必胜比赛将于英国夏令时周一凌晨1点开始--可能需要迪斯科午睡和无扰流板的回顾。

title.en: Premier League clubs interested in Japan's Nakamura
title.zh-CN: 对日本中村有兴趣的英超俱乐部

summary.en: Japan winger Keito Nakamura is keen to move to the Premier League this summer after attracting interest from several clubs, following his impressive World Cup performances.
summary.zh-CN: 日本边锋中村惠人（ Keito Nakamura ）在世界杯上令人印象深刻的表现之后，在吸引了几家俱乐部的兴趣之后，他热衷于今年夏天转会英超联赛。

title.en: Balogun scores & sees red as USA beat Bosnia
title.zh-CN: Balogun在美国击败波斯尼亚时得分并看到红色

summary.en: Folarin Balogun scores and is later sent off as the United States advance past a lacklustre Bosnia-Herzegovina in Santa Clara to reach the last 16 of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun得分，后来随着美国在圣克拉拉越过平淡无奇的波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那，进入世界杯的最后16场比赛而被罚下场。

title.en: England fans face resale prices of at least £2,600 for Mexico tickets
title.zh-CN: 英格兰球迷面临墨西哥门票至少2600 £的转售价格

summary.en: England fans hoping to attend the World Cup last-16 showdown with Mexico face paying a minimum of £2,600 for one ticket on Fifa's resale site.
summary.zh-CN: 希望参加世界杯16强对决的英格兰球迷将在国际足联转售网站上支付至少2,600 £购买一张门票。

summary.en: Can co-hosts USA surpass their last 16 run of 1994?

title.zh-CN: 铜牌与切尔西续约至2027年

summary.zh-CN: 英格兰国脚露西·布朗兹已与切尔西续约至2027年。
